basics.name: Jiayi Xie
basics.summary: LLM Agent and Applied ML researcher working on Agentic RL, LLM post-training, anomaly detection, and research automation.

work.name: TikTok
highlights: Focused on VLMs, agentic reasoning, RFT, and Agentic RL.

work.name: Meituan
work.summary: LLM agent post-training for rule-constrained food-ordering workflows.
highlights: Prompt engineering and workflow optimization for food-ordering agents.
Built data pipelines from online queries, model rollouts, and rule validators.
Designed curriculum learning and reward functions.

work.name: University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
highlights: Trained a new Mamba-based audio encoder.

publications.name: Anomaly-Related Residual Fields for Cross-domain Anomaly Detection
publications.summary: Diffusion residual-field modeling for robust cross-domain unsupervised anomaly detection.

publications.name: SAT: From Diverse Anomalies to Structured Representations for Cross-Domain Detection
publications.summary: Structured representations for cross-domain anomaly detection.

publications.name: Manifold-Connected Representation Learning for Graph Anomaly Detection
publications.summary: Representation learning for transfer-oriented graph anomaly detection.

publications.name: Domain-Aware Gradient Reuse for Cross-Domain Anomaly Detection
publications.summary: Reusable optimization signals for cross-domain anomaly detection.

portfolio.name: LLM Agent Post-Training for Rule-Constrained Food Ordering
portfolio.description: Prompt engineering, SFT, GRPO, curriculum learning, and reward design for production-style ordering agents.
